title: AS 1670.1 — Fire detection, warning, control and intercom systems — System design, installation and commissioning — Fire
summary: Defines design, installation and commissioning requirements for automatic fire detection systems in Australia. Covers detector spacing, zoning, FIP location, ASE, brigade interface and verification testing.

clauses.title: Definitions
clauses.paraphrase: Defines key terms (FIP, ASE, addressable point, zone, AVF).

clauses.title: Detector spacing — smoke
clauses.paraphrase: Maximum spacing for photoelectric / ionisation point detectors based on ceiling height and configuration. Typical: 100 m² coverage / ~10.6 m square grid for flat ceilings.

clauses.title: Detector spacing — heat
clauses.paraphrase: Spacing rules for fixed-temperature and rate-of-rise heat detectors. Typical: 50 m² coverage / ~7.0 m square grid.

clauses.title: Beam smoke detectors
clauses.paraphrase: Lateral spacing, beam length and obstruction/clearance for projected-beam smoke detectors.

clauses.title: Aspirating smoke detection (ASD)
clauses.paraphrase: Sampling pipe network rules: transport time, hole spacing, sensitivity classes A/B/C, AutoLearn.

clauses.title: Power supplies and batteries
clauses.paraphrase: Standby + alarm duration sizing, charger sizing, redundancy and battery routine maintenance.

clauses.title: Cause and effect / outputs
clauses.paraphrase: Mandatory output mapping for sounders, lift homing, AHU shutdown, smoke door release, AVF logic.

clauses.title: Zoning
clauses.paraphrase: Maximum zone area (≤ 2000 m² typical), one zone per floor, mandatory splits (stair, lift, riser, plant), labelling.

clauses.title: FIP siting
clauses.paraphrase: Location of fire indicator panel relative to entry point and brigade access; minimum mounting heights.

clauses.title: Manual call points
clauses.paraphrase: Spacing, mounting height (1.4 m typical) and travel distance for MCPs (≤ 30 m unobstructed).

clauses.title: Cable selection
clauses.paraphrase: Approved cable types (WS52W per AS/NZS 3013, MIMS, FP200, fire-rated SWA) and segregation requirements from non-fire services.

clauses.title: Verification testing
clauses.paraphrase: Commissioning verification: every detector exercised, every output witnessed, AVF logic tested.

title: AS 1670.4 — Fire detection, warning, control and intercom systems — Sound systems and intercom systems for emergency purposes (EWIS / OWS)
summary: Sound system, EWIS and warden intercom phone (WIP) requirements: speaker coverage, intelligibility (STI), tone schedules, intercom architecture.

clauses.title: Speaker coverage
clauses.paraphrase: Minimum SPL at occupant ear: 65 dB(A) typical / 75 dB(A) at bed-head. Speech transmission index (STI) ≥ 0.45.

clauses.title: Tone schedules
clauses.paraphrase: Alert / evacuation tone sequences and recorded message intervals.

clauses.title: WIP siting
clauses.paraphrase: Where warden intercom phones must be located: every floor near stair, weather-protected, identifiable.

clauses.title: Speaker line monitoring
clauses.paraphrase: End-of-line monitoring for SAC integrity; A/B redundancy rules for high-risk classes.

title: AS 4428.16 — Fire detection, warning, control and intercom systems — Control and indicating equipment — Emergency warning intercom system (EWIS)
summary: Functional requirements for EWIS control equipment: tone generation, amplifier monitoring, manual override, WIP master station, lamp test, fault tolerance.

clauses.title: Manual override
clauses.paraphrase: Operator must be able to take manual control of any zone (tone, voice or microphone) within 3 seconds.

clauses.title: Amplifier monitoring
clauses.paraphrase: Standby amplifier auto-engages on primary failure within 30 s.

clauses.title: WIP master station
clauses.paraphrase: Visual and audible indication of WIP off-hook; conferencing of multiple WIPs by warden.

title: AS 7240.21 — Fire detection and fire alarm systems — Routing equipment (ASE)
summary: Alarm signalling equipment to brigade — line monitoring, polling intervals, fault response, dual-path requirements.

clauses.title: Polling interval
clauses.paraphrase: Maximum polling interval to monitoring centre; missed-poll fault thresholds.

clauses.title: Dual-path
clauses.paraphrase: Primary + secondary path requirements (PSTN/IP/cellular) for high-risk classes.

title: AS 7240.23 — Fire detection and fire alarm systems — Visual alarm devices (VADs)
summary: Strobe / VAD specification: candela rating, coverage volume class C/W/O, mounting heights and spacing.

clauses.title: Coverage volume
clauses.paraphrase: Class C (ceiling) / W (wall) / O (open) — required cd at room corners for given room dimensions.

clauses.title: Mounting height
clauses.paraphrase: Wall-mounted VADs at 2.0–2.4 m AFFL; ceiling-mounted in centre of coverage volume.

title: AS 1851 — Routine service of fire protection systems and equipment
summary: Routine maintenance, inspection and testing schedule for fire systems including detection, sprinklers, hydrants, doors and ventilation.

clauses.title: Monthly inspection — FIP
clauses.paraphrase: Visual checks, fault list review, battery condition indicators.

clauses.title: Six-monthly tests
clauses.paraphrase: Detector functional sample (10–25%), MCP test, ASE / brigade signalling test, cause-and-effect spot-check.

clauses.title: Annual battery load test
clauses.paraphrase: 30-minute discharge test on FIP standby batteries; voltage drop limits per battery type.

clauses.title: Records
clauses.paraphrase: Logbook entries, baseline records, defect register, test certificate retention 10 yr.

clauses.title: Sprinkler routine service
clauses.paraphrase: Fire pump weekly test, valve position monthly, alarm valve trip annual.

clauses.title: Standby generator service
clauses.paraphrase: Weekly run, monthly load test, annual load-bank test.

title: AS 2118.1 — Automatic fire sprinkler systems — General systems
summary: Design and installation of automatic sprinkler systems for general occupancies. Includes hydraulic design, valve sets, alarm interface to FIP.

clauses.title: Hydraulic design
clauses.paraphrase: Density / area design for hazard class; remote area assessment.

clauses.title: Alarm interface
clauses.paraphrase: Flow switch and tamper-switch monitoring inputs to FIP, with retard timer where required.

title: AS 2419.1 — Fire hydrant installations — System design, installation and commissioning
summary: Hydrant system design, pressure / flow performance and commissioning.

title: AS 2444 — Portable fire extinguishers and fire blankets — Selection and location
summary: Selection, classification and placement of portable extinguishers and blankets per fire risk class.

title: AS 3745 — Planning for emergencies in facilities
summary: Emergency planning, EPC structure, ECO appointments, drills, signage and procedures.

title: AS 1735.11 — Lifts, escalators and moving walks — Fire-rated lift
summary: Fire-mode and recall behaviour of lifts; how the FIP signals lift homing and what the lift controller must do.

clauses.title: Recall trigger
clauses.paraphrase: Smoke detection in lift lobby triggers recall to designated floor; manual brigade override controls.

title: AS 1668.1 — The use of ventilation and air-conditioning in buildings — Fire and smoke control in buildings
summary: Fire-mode behaviour of HVAC: smoke spill, AHU shutdown, stair pressurisation, smoke exhaust integration with FIP.

clauses.title: Stair pressurisation
clauses.paraphrase: Pressurisation fan must start within 30 s of fire signal; differential pressure 50 Pa.

clauses.title: AHU shutdown
clauses.paraphrase: AHU and recirculation fans shut down on smoke signal in served zone unless designed for smoke spill.

title: AS/NZS 3013 — Electrical installations — Classification of the fire and mechanical performance of wiring system elements
summary: WS classification (WS1W to WS52W) for fire-rated cables; mechanical impact rating (mech protection).

clauses.title: WS52W rating
clauses.paraphrase: 120-minute fire integrity, water spray + mechanical shock during fire — required for emergency-essential circuits.
